data.html_notes: <body>Planning card. Define how to refactor the Rumble Promo Worker into reusable code and design the integration with the Rumble Backend API. Output: design doc / approach + task breakdown for the implementation card.</body>
data.name: Plan: adapt Rumble Promo Worker to reusable code and integrate with Rumble Backend API
